EXIT_CODE=1

SUMMARY:
All 4 RED tests FAIL on baseline (5bb2ea2).
Failure modes map directly to the defect:
  - test_all_submit_review_fail_output_omits_well_done: AssertionError — "Well done" IS in output (baseline bug B2)
  - test_start_review_flow_submit_review_exception: AttributeError — skip_card absent from baseline ReviewSessionManager (baseline bug B1: no skip path)
  - test_start_review_flow_success_emits_well_done: assert None is True — baseline returns None instead of bool (return contract missing)
  - test_persistent_submit_failure_retries_same_card: AttributeError — skip_card absent from baseline API (B1)
